filesystem._comment: Enable after building mcp/filesystem container. Provides file system access to Projects, Obsidian vault, and Agent Global Hub.

obsidian._comment: Requires Node.js/npx. Provides semantic search and queries over Obsidian vault. Install: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_lts.x | sudo bash - && sudo dnf install -y nodejs

brave-search._comment: Requires Node.js/npx and Brave Search API key. Get key from: https://brave.com/search/api/

github._comment: Requires Node.js/npx and GitHub PAT. Provides access to GitHub repos, issues, PRs.

_readme: See ~/.claude/MCP_SETUP.md for installation and configuration instructions
